# AppClipAdvancedExperienceUpdateRequest.Data.Attributes.Place

**Object**

The place information of an advanced App Clip experience you create with this request.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppClipAdvancedExperienceUpdateRequest.Data.Attributes.Place
```

## Objects

- **AppClipAdvancedExperienceUpdateRequest.Data.Attributes.Place.DisplayPoint**: A point-based representation of a place in Apple Maps.
- **AppClipAdvancedExperienceUpdateRequest.Data.Attributes.Place.MainAddress**: The main address for a point of interest or business in Apple Maps.
- **AppClipAdvancedExperienceUpdateRequest.Data.Attributes.Place.PhoneNumber**: The phone number of a point of interest or business in Apple Maps.
